goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should be in the 'west'.
The hotel should 'include free parking' and should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'ely' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should 'arrive by 17:15'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'departure time', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the west
The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
Make sure you get star of the hotel and postcode
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to ely and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on tuesday and should arrive by 17:15
Make sure you get train ID, departure time, and price
